task_objective: Multi-Style Press-on Nail Design Generation based on Sketch Structure

structure_reference.focus: Nail shapes, nail count, proportions, spacing, curvature, and layout composition

aesthetic_reference.focus: Colors, patterns, styling mood, and fashion aesthetics
aesthetic_reference.role: Provide aesthetic foundation for prompts of all four nail design

workflow.step_1: Extract Colors, patterns, styling mood, and fashion aesthetics from the inspiration image while ignoring structure.
workflow.step_2: Generate 4 different nail design prompts based on the extracted aesthetics from Input 2.
workflow.step_3: Apply all four prompts onto the exact sketch structure from Input 1 without any structural deviation.
workflow.step_4: Generate 4 different press-on nail designs in a balanced 2x2 grid layout.

output_requirements: All four outputs shapes must perfectly match the sketch structure from Input 1,No structural deformation or repositioning
Bottom-right: Cat eye style nail design
